top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index falls to 2667 down 17 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Tuesday, June 23 2026, the Baltic Dry Index decreased by 17 points, reaching 2667 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore.
